heading: Technical assistance
label: 6439 Technical assistance
text: The Secretary may reserve not more than 2.5 percent of the amount made available to carry out this subpart for a fiscal year to provide technical assistance to and support the capacity building of State agency programs assisted under this subpart.
notes: Amendments2015—, in section catchline, substituted “Technical assistance” for “Evaluation; technical assistance; annual model program” and, in text, substituted “for a fiscal year” for “for a fiscal year—”, struck out par. (2) designation before “to provide”, and struck out par. (1) which read as follows: “to develop a uniform model to evaluate the effectiveness of programs assisted under this subpart; and”.Pub. L. 114–95

Effective Date of 2015 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 114–95section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this titleDec. 10, 2015
